  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Quality Control Officer – Feed Analysis Laboratory",
  "description": "We are Animal Care Service Konsult Nigeria Limited, an agro-allied company specializing in livestock farming, feed milling, technical laboratory services, and the marketing of animal health products. Committed to animal health and production, we strive to be the leading operator in Nigeria&#39;s livestock industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quality Control Officer &ndash; Feed Analysis Laboratory

Job Location:&nbsp;Ogere, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary&nbsp;


	Conduct proximate and other laboratory analyses on finished feeds and raw materials.
	Ensure proper sampling, testing, and validation of feed products.
	Maintain laboratory equipment in accordance with operational and safety standards.
	Monitor and ensure compliance with ISO/IEC 17025 guidelines.
	Accurately collect, interpret, sort, and document test results.
	Maintain proper laboratory records and quality control documentation.
	Ensure adherence to quality assurance procedures and regulatory requirements.
	Support continuous improvement initiatives within the laboratory.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;oawolesi@animalcare-ng.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;Quality Control Officer &ndash; Feed Lab&rdquo; as the subject of the email.",

Quality Control Officer – Feed Analysis Laboratory Job at Animal Care Service Konsult Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        We are Animal Care Service Konsult Nigeria Limited, an agro-allied company specializing in livestock farming, feed milling, technical laboratory services, and the marketing of animal health products. Committed to animal health and production, we strive to be the leading operator in Nigeria's livestock industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quality Control Officer – Feed Analysis Laboratory

Job Location: Ogere, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Conduct proximate and other laboratory analyses on finished feeds and raw materials.
	Ensure proper sampling, testing, and validation of feed products.
	Maintain laboratory equipment in accordance with operational and safety standards.
	Monitor and ensure compliance with ISO/IEC 17025 guidelines.
	Accurately collect, interpret, sort, and document test results.
	Maintain proper laboratory records and quality control documentation.
	Ensure adherence to quality assurance procedures and regulatory requirements.
	Support continuous improvement initiatives within the laboratory.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: oawolesi@animalcare-ng.com using “Quality Control Officer – Feed Lab” as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media / Content Creator",
  "description": "Doo Havilah Medspa (also known as Doo Havilah Aesthetics) is a premier, high-end skincare clinic and spa based in Abuja, Nigeria, dedicated to providing advanced, medically-backed aesthetic treatments. It focuses on transforming skin health for clients facing issues like acne, aging, and hyperpigmentation through personalized, innovative, and non-surgical procedures in a luxurious, tranquil setting.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media / Content Creator

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Develop and implement a monthly social media content calendar.
	Create engaging content (videos, reels, graphics, captions) for Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and other relevant platforms.
	Plan and execute content around treatments, products, promotions, and client testimonials.
	Manage daily posting, engagement, and community management (responding to comments &amp; DMs).
	Drive sales through strategic content and online campaigns.
	Collaborate with management to align marketing strategies with business goals.
	Monitor social media analytics and provide weekly/monthly performance reports.
	Stay updated on industry trends, content trends, and competitor activities.
	Coordinate and supervise photoshoots, treatment videos, and promotional content.
	Support online advertising campaigns where necessary.


Key Performance Expectations


	Increase brand visibility and engagement.
	Grow social media following organically.
	Drive measurable bookings and product sales from digital platforms.
	Maintain consistent brand image and content quality.


Experience &amp; Qualifications


	OND / HND / BSc in Marketing, Communications, Media, or related&nbsp;field (preferred but not mandatory if highly skilled).
	1&ndash;3 years of experience as a Social Media Manager or Content Creator.
	Experience in beauty, skincare, aesthetics, or lifestyle brands is an added advantage.
	Proven portfolio of previous social media pages managed.
	Demonstrated growth and engagement results from past roles.


Required Skills:


	Strong content creation skills (video shooting &amp; editing).
	Proficiency in Canva, CapCut, InShot, and Adobe (basic knowledge is a plus).
	Excellent copywriting and caption-writing skills.
	Strong understanding of Instagram, TikTok algorithms &amp; trends.
	Ability to create engaging Reels and short-form video content.
	Sales-driven mindset (ability to convert followers into paying clients).
	Good communication and organizational skills.
	Attention to detail and ability to meet deadlines.


(Additional information):


	Graphic Design savvy is an Added Advantage.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their current CV / Portfolio to:&nbsp;Doohavilahoperations@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Social Media / Content Creator Job at Doo Havilah Medspa




        
    

        
        Doo Havilah Medspa (also known as Doo Havilah Aesthetics) is a premier, high-end skincare clinic and spa based in Abuja, Nigeria, dedicated to providing advanced, medically-backed aesthetic treatments. It focuses on transforming skin health for clients facing issues like acne, aging, and hyperpigmentation through personalized, innovative, and non-surgical procedures in a luxurious, tranquil setting.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media / Content Creator

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Develop and implement a monthly social media content calendar.
	Create engaging content (videos, reels, graphics, captions) for Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and other relevant platforms.
	Plan and execute content around treatments, products, promotions, and client testimonials.
	Manage daily posting, engagement, and community management (responding to comments & DMs).
	Drive sales through strategic content and online campaigns.
	Collaborate with management to align marketing strategies with business goals.
	Monitor social media analytics and provide weekly/monthly performance reports.
	Stay updated on industry trends, content trends, and competitor activities.
	Coordinate and supervise photoshoots, treatment videos, and promotional content.
	Support online advertising campaigns where necessary.


Key Performance Expectations


	Increase brand visibility and engagement.
	Grow social media following organically.
	Drive measurable bookings and product sales from digital platforms.
	Maintain consistent brand image and content quality.


Experience & Qualifications


	OND / HND / BSc in Marketing, Communications, Media, or related field (preferred but not mandatory if highly skilled).
	1–3 years of experience as a Social Media Manager or Content Creator.
	Experience in beauty, skincare, aesthetics, or lifestyle brands is an added advantage.
	Proven portfolio of previous social media pages managed.
	Demonstrated growth and engagement results from past roles.


Required Skills:


	Strong content creation skills (video shooting & editing).
	Proficiency in Canva, CapCut, InShot, and Adobe (basic knowledge is a plus).
	Excellent copywriting and caption-writing skills.
	Strong understanding of Instagram, TikTok algorithms & trends.
	Ability to create engaging Reels and short-form video content.
	Sales-driven mindset (ability to convert followers into paying clients).
	Good communication and organizational skills.
	Attention to detail and ability to meet deadlines.


(Additional information):


	Graphic Design savvy is an Added Advantage.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their current CV / Portfolio to: Doohavilahoperations@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Construction Manager",
  "description": "Anas Atiantic Services Limited is a dynamic and client-centric business services company registered and operating in Ikeja, Lagos, Nigeria. We are committed to delivering high-quality solutions that help businesses grow, compete, and connect in today&rsquo;s fast-changing market.

Founded on the belief that innovation and strategic excellence drive success, Anas Atiantic Services Limited combines creativity, technology, and professionalism to meet the diverse needs of our clients. Our team comprises experienced professionals passionate about delivering results.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Construction Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary&nbsp;


	We are currently seeking a reliable Construction Manager to join our team.


Responsibilities


	Oversee and direct construction projects from conception to completion
	Review the project in-depth to schedule deliverables and estimate costs
	Oversee all onsite and offsite constructions to monitor compliance with building and safety regulations
	Coordinate and direct construction workers and subcontractors
	Select tools, materials and equipment and track inventory
	Meet contractual conditions of performance
	Review the work progress on daily basis
	Prepare internal and external reports pertaining to job status
	Plan ahead to prevent problems and resolve any emerging ones
	Negotiate terms of agreements, draft contracts and obtain permits and licences
	Analyse, manage and mitigate risks
	Ensure quality construction standards and the use of proper construction techniques.


Requirements


	Advanced knowledge of construction management processes, means and methods
	Expert knowledge of building products, construction details and relevant rules, regulations and quality standards
	Understanding of all facets of the construction process
	Familiarity with construction management software packages
	Ability to plan and see the &ldquo;big picture&rdquo;
	Competent in conflict and crisis management
	Leadership and human resources management skills
	Excellent time and project management skill.


Method of Application

Construction Manager Job at Anas Atiantic Services Limited




        
    

        
        Anas Atiantic Services Limited is a dynamic and client-centric business services company registered and operating in Ikeja, Lagos, Nigeria. We are committed to delivering high-quality solutions that help businesses grow, compete, and connect in today’s fast-changing market.

Founded on the belief that innovation and strategic excellence drive success, Anas Atiantic Services Limited combines creativity, technology, and professionalism to meet the diverse needs of our clients. Our team comprises experienced professionals passionate about delivering results.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Construction Manager

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Summary 


	We are currently seeking a reliable Construction Manager to join our team.


Responsibilities


	Oversee and direct construction projects from conception to completion
	Review the project in-depth to schedule deliverables and estimate costs
	Oversee all onsite and offsite constructions to monitor compliance with building and safety regulations
	Coordinate and direct construction workers and subcontractors
	Select tools, materials and equipment and track inventory
	Meet contractual conditions of performance
	Review the work progress on daily basis
	Prepare internal and external reports pertaining to job status
	Plan ahead to prevent problems and resolve any emerging ones
	Negotiate terms of agreements, draft contracts and obtain permits and licences
	Analyse, manage and mitigate risks
	Ensure quality construction standards and the use of proper construction techniques.


Requirements


	Advanced knowledge of construction management processes, means and methods
	Expert knowledge of building products, construction details and relevant rules, regulations and quality standards
	Understanding of all facets of the construction process
	Familiarity with construction management software packages
	Ability to plan and see the “big picture”
	Competent in conflict and crisis management
	Leadership and human resources management skills
	Excellent time and project management skill.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: anasatianticserviceslimited@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

We focus on connecting healthcare facilities with highly skilled professionals, enabling efficient operations, and driving business growth. Our services extend to recruitment, Templates for process and operations management, SOP development, and healthcare-specific training, with a clear mission to transform the healthcare workforce and operations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human Resources Manager
Job Location:&nbsp;Owerri, Imo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are hiring an experienced HR Manager to oversee recruitment, performance management, payroll (PAYE), reward management, and overall HR operations. Manufacturing experience is strongly preferred.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage recruitment and onboarding
	Oversee performance management systems
	Manage compensation and benefits
	Handle PAYE and payroll coordination
	Ensure compliance with labor laws
	Develop and implement HR policies.


Requirements


	HND / B.Sc qualification
	Experience managing HR in a medium-sized organization
	Manufacturing sector experience preferred
	Strong discipline and accountability.


Salary
N450,000 + Performance Incentive.",

Human Resources Manager Job at Castville Solutions




        
    

        
        Castville Solutions is a recruitment and business solutions provider specializing in the healthcare sector. We focus on connecting healthcare facilities with highly skilled professionals, enabling efficient operations, and driving business growth. Our services extend to recruitment, Templates for process and operations management, SOP development, and healthcare-specific training, with a clear mission to transform the healthcare workforce and operations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human Resources Manager
Job Location: Owerri, Imo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are hiring an experienced HR Manager to oversee recruitment, performance management, payroll (PAYE), reward management, and overall HR operations. Manufacturing experience is strongly preferred.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage recruitment and onboarding
	Oversee performance management systems
	Manage compensation and benefits
	Handle PAYE and payroll coordination
	Ensure compliance with labor laws
	Develop and implement HR policies.


Requirements


	HND / B.Sc qualification
	Experience managing HR in a medium-sized organization
	Manufacturing sector experience preferred
	Strong discipline and accountability.


Salary
N450,000 + Performance Incentive.    

    

        Click here to Apply
